cs2.changelog:
- Improved «Hit Chance»
- Improved «Multipoint»
- Improved overall Rage Aimbot accuracy.
- Added «Force Lethal In Air» feature. It forces a lethal minimum damage until the targeted player hits the ground.

cs2-csgo_legacy.changelog:
- luas that worked before now work again
- wapi lib is removed because i find it unecessary and dangerous. just comment it out of any lua and it'll work fine
- got rid of all warnings in nl build process
- removed some 'closure' libraries that were included in the original library leak that i got from stefan/daniel, they look hella weird idk
- restored build.rs so libraries would build into the binary properly. i forgot that did something
- fixed duplicate entries
